case_title: MARCO A RECINOS VS. JACOBO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RECINOS, MARCO A AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JACOBO AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED(SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
